description_long: This is a metallic open-ended wrench with a long, flat handle and a single open jaw at one end. The wrench is predominantly black with a glossy finish, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The handle is straight and tapers slightly towards the jaw, featuring a circular hole at the opposite end, likely for hanging or storage. The jaw is fixed and has a standard U-shape, suitable for gripping nuts and bolts. There are no visible grip patterns or rubber inserts on the handle, indicating a smooth metal surface. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, typical for hand tools used in urban maintenance or repair settings.
description: A sleek, black, open-ended metal wrench with a long, flat handle and a single U-shaped jaw. The handle is smooth and features a circular hole for storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open jaw and the full length of the handle with the circular hole visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the flatness of the handle and the thickness of the jaw.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the jaw and the handle's end, with the circular hole prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the flat handle and the open jaw from the other direction.
